dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — now in FAHHHHD! Stein Bagger is over. But Suspekt & Folkeklubben - Danmark is just getting started! And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: You've stumbled onto Nostalgia Overload Radio from the Timeline That Wasn't.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Suspekt & Folkeklubben - Danmark
